finalPhaseStructure: P1→P2(multi-tenant foundation from day one + P3 commercial tier label as feature unlock)→P4
keyP2ArchChanges: Multi-tenant foundation is a P2 day-one requirement — not a P2→P3 migration
tenant_id (NOT NULL, indexed) on ALL Postgres tables from P2 day one
Row-Level Security (RLS) policies enforced at Postgres level from P2 day one
agent_shared_state table requires optimistic locking (version column) from P2 day one
Access control matrix per tenant: agent roles scoped to tenant context from P2 day one
Company-level auth hooks: org_id field, group membership, SSO/SAML integration points stubbed in P2
Cross-tenant access architecturally prohibited at schema level from P2 day one
P3 commercial tier (company/multi-agent) = feature flag and commercial unlock on top of P2 foundation — no separate infra build
Phase sequence updated: P1→P2→P4 (P3 label survives as commercial tier only)
p3CommercialTier: Feature unlock within P2. Enabled on demand, ROI-gated. Delivers: company/multi-agent capabilities, shared context + data across an organisation, org-level auth (SSO/SAML), multi-agent orchestration for a single client org. No separate build deliverables. No separate deployment phase.
openQuestionsForKen: P2 multi-tenancy isolation model: shared schema + RLS from day one, or schema-per-tenant for early P2 (<=20 tenants) then migrate? Decision 6 in DataMemory doc updated to recommend RLS from day one but Ken should confirm.
P3 commercial tier ROI trigger: what is the threshold criteria for enabling the company/multi-agent feature flag for a client? Should this be documented as a formal ROI checklist?
Q9 in DataMemory doc resolved per CHG-0234 — no further input needed on that question.
amendmentNotes: All 7 documents amended with CHG-0234 phase structure. Approach: prominent amendment banners added at top of each doc, Phase Reference tables updated, P3 rows/references relabelled as commercial tier within P2, Decision 6 (multi-tenancy) updated to reflect day-one requirement, roadmap sections updated, governance framework review trigger updated. No tables dropped — P3 column relabelled as 'P3 Commercial Tier (within P2)' for traceability.
